requirement_topic.en: Marshalls Energy Company (MEC)Grid Connection — 120/240 V 60 Hz Revalidation
requirement_topic.zh: 马绍尔群岛电力照明公司（MEC）电网接入——120/240 V 60 Hz重新验证
requirement_topic.zht: 馬紹爾群島電力照明公司（MEC）電網接入——120/240 V 60 Hz重新驗證

summary.en: The Marshall Islands is a US-heritage 60 Hz island-grid market. EV charger installations must be engineered for the local Marshall Islands Power and Light supply context, commonly 120/240 V single-phase service for premises and 60 Hz frequency, with project-specific confirmation for larger commercial or fleet sites. Because the grid is islanded and hurricane-prone, site design should address service capacity, protective devices, earthing, surge protection, salt-air corrosion, water ingress, wind exposure, and restoration after outages. Marshalls Energy Company (MEC)review or approval may be needed for new loads, metering, service upgrades, demand management, and grid-connected public charging projects.
summary.zh: 马绍尔群岛属于美国体系延伸的60 Hz海岛电网市场。充电桩安装须按马绍尔群岛电力照明公司当地供电环境进行工程设计，常见场所供电为120/240 V单相、60 Hz；较大型商业或车队站点须按项目确认。由于电网为海岛系统且飓风多发，现场设计应覆盖供电容量、保护器件、接地、防浪涌、盐雾腐蚀、防水、抗风暴暴露，以及停电后的恢复。新增负荷、计量、服务升级、需求管理和公共充电项目可能需要马绍尔群岛电力照明公司（MEC）审查或批准。
summary.zht: 馬紹爾群島屬於美國體系延伸的60 Hz海島電網市場。充電樁安裝須按馬紹爾群島電力照明公司當地供電環境進行工程設計，常見場所供電為120/240 V單相、60 Hz；較大型商業或車隊站點須按項目確認。由於電網為海島系統且颶風多發，現場設計應覆蓋供電容量、保護器件、接地、防浪湧、鹽霧腐蝕、防水、抗風暴暴露，以及停電後的恢復。新增負荷、計量、服務升級、需求管理和公共充電項目可能需要馬紹爾群島電力照明公司（MEC）審查或批准。

standards_or_laws: Marshall Islands Power and Light service and project connection requirements
Ministry of Works, Infrastructure & Utilities electricity-sector regulation and licensing context
120/240 V 60 Hz US-heritage service assumptions for site design
IEC 61000 series — power quality and EMC reference where specified by project

summary.en: China domestic EV chargers are commonly designed and documented for 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz supply, with project acceptance by Chinese grid operators. GB/T 18487.1-2023 and related GB/T documents do not prove that a charger input stage, filters, relays, protection devices, cooling system, or metering will operate correctly on 60 Hz Marshall Islands service or at 120/240 V premises supply.
summary.zh: 中国国内电动汽车充电桩通常按220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供电设计和准备文件，并由中国电网运营商进行项目验收。GB/T 18487.1-2023及相关GB/T文件不能证明充电桩输入级、滤波器、继电器、保护器件、冷却系统或计量系统可在马绍尔群岛60 Hz供电及120/240 V场所供电下正确运行。
summary.zht: 中國國內電動汽車充電樁通常按220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供電設計和準備文件，並由中國電網運營商進行項目驗收。GB/T 18487.1-2023及相關GB/T文件不能證明充電樁輸入級、濾波器、繼電器、保護器件、冷卻系統或計量系統可在馬紹爾群島60 Hz供電及120/240 V場所供電下正確運行。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must treat the Marshall Islands grid mismatch as fundamental: both voltage and frequency differ from China's domestic baseline. Required work includes 60 Hz input-stage revalidation, 120/240 V operating-range confirmation, protection coordination, thermal and fan-speed checks, metering and communications review, site load calculations, and Marshalls Energy Company (MEC)coordination for service capacity or public-charging connection. A China-only 220/380 V 50 Hz design is not Marshall Islands grid-ready.
gap.zh: 出口商必须将马绍尔群岛电网差异视为根本差距：电压和频率均不同于中国国内基线。所需工作包括60 Hz输入级重新验证、120/240 V工作范围确认、保护配合、热设计和风扇转速检查、计量及通信复核、现场负荷计算，以及就供电容量或公共充电接入与马绍尔群岛电力照明公司（MEC）协调。仅按中国220/380 V 50 Hz设计的产品不具备马绍尔群岛并网就绪性。
gap.zht: 出口商必須將馬紹爾群島電網差異視為根本差距：電壓和頻率均不同於中國國內基線。所需工作包括60 Hz輸入級重新驗證、120/240 V工作範圍確認、保護配合、熱設計和風扇轉速檢查、計量及通訊復核、現場負荷計算，以及就供電容量或公共充電接入與馬紹爾群島電力照明公司（MEC）協調。僅按中國220/380 V 50 Hz設計的產品不具備馬紹爾群島併網就緒性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at project level — Marshalls Energy Company (MEC)service capacity, metering, protection, and site-connection requirements must be confirmed for grid-connected EV charger installations; 60 Hz and 120/240 V electrical suitability is a technical prerequisite
mandatory_status.cn: China grid acceptance applies domestically and is not a Marshall Islands Marshalls Energy Company (MEC)approval substitute; 220/380 V 50 Hz evidence does not prove Marshall Islands 120/240 V 60 Hz suitability

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Marshall Islands-ready charger package must prove operation on 120/240 V 60 Hz service and include site load, protection, metering, surge, enclosure, and Marshalls Energy Company (MEC)coordination evidence. China domestic 220/380 V 50 Hz evidence is not enough.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向马绍尔群岛的充电桩资料包必须证明可在120/240 V 60 Hz供电下运行，并包括现场负荷、保护、计量、防浪涌、外壳及马绍尔群岛电力照明公司（MEC）协调证据。中国国内220/380 V 50 Hz证据并不足够。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向馬紹爾群島的充電樁資料包必須證明可在120/240 V 60 Hz供電下運行，並包括現場負荷、保護、計量、防浪湧、外殼及馬紹爾群島電力照明公司（MEC）協調證據。中國國內220/380 V 50 Hz證據並不足夠。
